project.name: 分类展示页重设计
project.designRead: resource catalog / general users / warm editorial premium / medium density / avoid cold corporate grid

iconAssets.coloringRule: currentColor by default; override with Library token when needed

pages.title: 分类展示
pages.visualNorthStar: A warm editorial category browsing experience with generous spacing, serif-led typography, and calm neutral surfaces that invite exploration
pages.compositionPattern: sidebar + main grid with featured category hero band and three-up subcategory cards

continuityAnchors.colorSystem: warm cocoa primary #3b352b, parchment canvas #fbfaf9, golden secondary #9b965f, muted accent #cbc0aa
continuityAnchors.shapeSystem: large 2rem radius on all cards and buttons, soft borders at #e1dccf
continuityAnchors.typographySystem: Fraunces serif for all text, 0.01em tracking, generous spacing
continuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 0.3rem base spacing unit, generous internal padding on all containers
continuityAnchors.componentLanguage: warm neutral card surfaces, soft hover transitions, editorial tag pills
continuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: nearly invisible shadows (opacity 0), borders and surface tone define hierarchy
continuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: css-mask icons from library, warm-toned imagery
continuityAnchors.interactionTone: restrained hover transitions (-1px translate), subtle background shifts

pages.soulElement: Featured category hero band at the top with a warm accent background and editorial copy that frames browsing as a curated collection experience

pages.title: 资源列表
pages.visualNorthStar: A refined resource gallery with filter bar, grid/list view toggle, and warm editorial cards that feel like browsing a premium catalog
pages.compositionPattern: filter topbar + breadcrumb + view mode toggle + three-column resource card grid with editorial card treatment

continuityAnchors.colorSystem: warm cocoa primary #3b352b, parchment canvas #fbfaf9, golden secondary #9b965f, muted accent #cbc0aa
continuityAnchors.shapeSystem: large 2rem radius on all cards and buttons, soft borders at #e1dccf
continuityAnchors.typographySystem: Fraunces serif for all text, 0.01em tracking, generous spacing
continuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 0.3rem base spacing unit, generous internal padding on all containers
continuityAnchors.componentLanguage: warm neutral card surfaces, soft hover transitions, editorial tag pills
continuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: nearly invisible shadows (opacity 0), borders and surface tone define hierarchy
continuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: css-mask icons from library, warm-toned imagery
continuityAnchors.interactionTone: restrained hover transitions (-1px translate), subtle background shifts

pages.soulElement: Grid/list toggle with editorial resource cards that reveal tags and description on hover, making the browse feel like flipping through a curated collection catalog
